metaDescription: Meet the people behind Dove Cottage Day Hospice, from nursing and admin to retail teams and trustees.
heroImageAlt: Three Dove Cottage team members smiling together in festive attire
heroShortDescription: Partnership, trust, and compassionate care are at the heart of everything we do.

trustBlocks.title: A Team Built on Trust
trustBlocks.body: Our people work across clinical care, operations, retail, and governance to make sure families receive consistent, high-quality support. We believe trust is built through clear communication, kindness, and dependable teamwork.
trustBlocks.imageAlt: Three Dove Cottage team members smiling together

trustBlocks.title: Culture That Puts People First
trustBlocks.body: From frontline care to behind-the-scenes support, we create a welcoming culture where every role matters. We support one another, share knowledge, and stay focused on helping local people live well with serious illness.
trustBlocks.imageAlt: Supportive team culture in a Dove Cottage charity shop

departments.name: Executive Leadership
departments.description: Strategic direction, partnerships, and long-term sustainability.
departments.imageAlt: Dove Cottage leadership setting inside the hospice

departments.name: Nursing Team
departments.description: Clinical expertise, day hospice care, and guest wellbeing support.
departments.imageAlt: Clinical treatment room representing the nursing team

departments.name: Admin & Support
departments.description: Coordination, communications, finance, and operational support.
departments.imageAlt: Hospice corridor representing day-to-day operations and admin support

departments.name: Shop Staff
departments.description: Retail teams and volunteers helping drive essential fundraising income.
departments.imageAlt: Dove Cottage charity shop frontage representing the retail team

departments.name: Trustees
departments.description: Governance, oversight, and stewardship of our charitable mission.
departments.imageAlt: Supporter board representing trustees and community stewardship

testimonials.quote: The team at Dove Cottage are kind, professional, and always make people feel welcome.
testimonials.authorPhotoAlt: Placeholder profile image for testimonial author

testimonials.quote: Working with Dove Cottage has been a genuine partnership rooted in trust and shared values.
